name: VEBA Plan Aggregation Election

eligibility.description: Available to employers maintaining section 501(c)(9) or 501(c)(17) organizations that need to aggregate plans to meet highly compensated individual nondiscrimination tests.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Employers can elect to treat two or more benefit plans as a single plan to satisfy nondiscrimination requirements for Voluntary Employees' Beneficiary Associations (VEBAs).
